changes.value:
`avp-common/src/context.rs:7-17` — module doc comment

The module-level doc comment says:
```
// User-level validators can be placed in `~/<AVP_DIR>/validators/`.
```
and the struct doc at line 104 says:
```
// - User: `~/<AVP_DIR>/` in home directory
```

But after this change the user path is `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/` (defaults to `~/.local/share/avp/`), not `~/.avp/`. The comment using `<AVP_DIR>` as a placeholder is also confusing — `AvpConfig::DIR_NAME` is `.avp` but the XDG path uses `AvpConfig::XDG_NAME` which is `avp` (no dot).

Similarly, `avp-common/src/validator/loader.rs` lines 5-7 say:
```
// 2. User validators (~/<AVP_DIR>/validators)
// 3. Project validators (./<AVP_DIR>/validators)
```
which are stale.

Suggestion: Update all doc comments that mention `~/<AVP_DIR>/` to say `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/` (defaults to `~/.local/share/avp/`).
warning: avp-common/src/context.rs doc comment still refers to old ~/.avp path instead of XDG
